ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "purchase_address" TEXT /* Address where the order will be delivered */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the order will be delivered */,
  "sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the order */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour when the order was placed */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute when the order was placed */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Placed, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., Paid, Pending, Failed) */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Channel where the order was placed (e.g., Web, Mobile App) */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address (if different from the purchase address) */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billing address (if different from the purchase address) */,
  "order_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order source (e.g., a marketing campaign) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the customer joined */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  "customer_segment" TEXT /* Customer segment (e.g., New, Returning, VIP) */,
  "last_order_date" TEXT /* Date of the last order placed by the customer */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "preferred_communication_method" TEXT /* Preferred communication method (e.g., Email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "inventory_count" INTEGER /* Current inventory count of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period in months */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the product was added to the inventory */,
  "date_last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price_each" REAL /* Price of each unit of the product */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the order item */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the order item */,
  "shipping_fee" REAL /* Shipping fee for the order item */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Return status (e.g., Not Returned, Returned, Refunded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_performance" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales performance record */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month for which the sales performance is recorded */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the sales performance is recorded */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the month */,
  "order_count" INTEGER /* Number of orders placed in the month */,
  "average_order_value" REAL /* Average order value for the month */,
  "new_customers" INTEGER /* Number of new customers acquired in the month */,
  "returning_customers" INTEGER /* Number of returning customers in the month */,
  "best_selling_product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the best-selling product for the month */,
  "worst_selling_product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worst-selling product for the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_performance_best_selling_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("best_selling_product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_performance_worst_selling_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("worst_selling_product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
